headline: Uber’s robotaxi lobbying effort puts it on a collision course with Waymo
summary: Washington, D.C. has become a battleground for Uber and Waymo's competing views.

headline: Overture Maps Foundation Reaches 50 Members as Industry Converges on Open Data to Ground AI
summary: Overture Maps Foundation, a collaborative effort to build a foundational base layer of map data to facilitate data exchange, today announced it has reached 50 members, nearly doubling its 2024 count, as more industries turn to open spatial data to ground AI systems in the real world.

headline: Zip Opens New York City Hub, Plans to Double Local Team
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & NEW YORK, July 13, 2026--Zip opens NYC hub in former Twitter building; flagship Zip Forward conference debuts in NYC this fall with speakers from Visa, Shopify, and Uber

headline: Wall Street Bullish on WeRide (WRD) Due to Partnerships and Expansion
summary: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ:WRD) has declined more than 44% over the past 6 months, mainly due to investor concerns regarding rising US-China trade tensions, significant cash burn, and rising market competition. Despite the decline, analysts continue to maintain a bullish outlook with their 12-month average price target suggesting more than 150% upside from the current levels. […]
